text: In today's video, I will tell you about heading and paragraphs along with that I will tell you about anchor text If you found this course awesome, then do like this video Your likes will help me to bring such free courses In this video, we will make a small project which will be a bookmark website This bookmark website will help you to bring all your favorite websites together and you will be able to use it in actual So let's start quickly, write in the comment below Sigma batch OP, let's roll the intro Intro music So guys, as you can see I have come to my computer screen and if you haven't accessed the playlist yet, then you can access it One more thing I want to tell you is that if you go to github.com or codewithery or repository then you will get the github repo of sigma web dev course I have made a folder of all the videos in this and the commit is also made according to the folder So you guys have to access this so that you can get the source code I will also put the source code in the description so there is no problem Now we will make a very basic website but it will be very important for us because it will be our first useful website So without taking much time I will make a new folder in this sigma web dev folder and I will name it video4 because it is our fourth video So I will make it with the name video4 by right clicking on the shift button and then I will click on open with code so that our folder opens in the VS code After doing this, I will do what we always do index.html, main.css, style.css and script.js We usually make these 3 files If I write css, I will put it here If I write script, I will put it here But for now, I will just write an exclamation mark here and write something like this in the document my bookmarks So we are going to make a bookmark website and I will write code withery here So you must have seen titles like this Now I will write h1 here Now what happens with h1? You can add a heading to your web page with h1 We talked about the basic structure We said that it tells that this is an HTML page html lang is equal to en lang is an attribute and its value is en which means that the content of this page is in English This tells the search engines or if anyone is sitting with the link of this web page then he will know that this web page is in English He can parse this web page accordingly The browser will also know that your web page is in English Now here is the head with the metadata what is the title of the page what is the css link all these things are information The main content is in the body Now to add the heading to the body there is a tag called h1 and I am going to write my bookmarks in it So if I write my bookmarks here then we will write this with h1 tag and if I want to live it here I will click here and after that I will open it in the browser So see how my bookmarks are visible Now why should we always use h1? and why didn't I write my bookmarks directly? because I am telling the browser that this is my heading and this is my first level heading Now suppose I want to keep two kinds of bookmarks in my bookmarks one is the main bookmarks and the other is the secondary bookmarks So I will use h2, which is the second level heading So if you have used Microsoft word then you would know what h1 and h2 are but if you don't know then I will tell you h1 is your main level heading and the second level heading is from h2 Suppose I say main bookmarks and secondary bookmarks Suppose I do something like this and here I will press alt, shift and down arrow I will do one thing why don't I turn on the screencast mode So what I did here is I pressed alt, shift and down arrow so this is replicated this is the shortcut of the BS code I would like to tell you another shortcut of the BS code that if you press alt in your keyboard and after that wherever you click there will be a cursor Suppose I click here then only one cursor will come but if I press alt and if I click somewhere else then there will be a cursor Suppose I want to code with all the bookmarks so I will type my bookmarks dash code with hri I can write something like this How did I do this? I clicked here and then I pressed alt and wherever I click I will get multiple cursor then whatever I type will come in multiple cursor wherever there are cursor, whatever I type will be visible Isn't it fun? Like this So I will remove it like this and you will see that it will be updated so this is my main heading this is my h2 similarly from h1 to h2 we have heading up to h6 suppose you gave a main heading after main heading you gave a secondary heading then after that you have to give some heading in that also and so on you have to give a lot of subheadings then you can give heading up to h6 h6 is more than enough in html headings are up to h6 you will never need h7 if we talk about practical life and if you keep on reading then you can use h6 repeatedly because it becomes so small after h1 that h6 will become very small so it will not be small at all now what I will do here I will replicate it with alt shift down arrow key and I will click here and press alt I am telling you all these shortcuts so that your productivity increases now I have put two cursor here and here I will press backspace and make it h3 then I will click here and press alt and click here and make it h4 ok and click here and click here and make it h5 ok after this I will click here and click here and make it h6 so it becomes h6 now what I will do I will write using h1 here so that you can understand and I will write using here at least I will press space I will write using and h and here I have left to do I will click here and write 2,3,4,5 and 6 and you can see it looks like this so you have understood that h1 is like this h2 is like this h3 is small, h4 is small, h5 is small h6 is small and what will happen if h6 is small it will be finished in a time so h6 is more than enough I will show you a practical demonstration of this suppose this is my html tutorial so here I have given the main heading html introduction then here I have given what is html then I have given features of html I have given this from h1 this I have given from h2 then if something came in h2 then I have given h3 then if something came in h2 then I have given h3 here why the term hyper text and markup language was there this is heading 2 what is the main heading page html introduction after this all this is heading I had to give a quick exercise in this too so I have used h3 in that too then I have come back to h2 because it was inside this so to build the hierarchy h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 are used I hope you have understood many people are commenting that you are starting very slow so we know this so I am making this course as a beginner course when I will tell you html then you will say yes this is very easy then I will tell you some CSR yes this also comes then I will tell you to put javascript yes this also comes yes this also comes then I will tell you to react then note JS then I will take things to MongoDB MySQL then the level will go up I had told you we will raise the bar this is what I meant so when we will react when we will make projects there then I will ask them for their comments that tell me what is the level so don't talk about the level so these are our headings 6 headings which I want to keep now if we want to write paragraphs then we can use P tag we will type P enter now I will tell you a shortcut trick if you want to write dummy paragraphs in emet-vs code then you will write here lorem23 and here emet abbreviation will give me 23 words something like this you can write word wrap on view you won't get scroll bar so you can write word wrap on view now here you can see lorem ifsum $it this is a dummy text we want dummy text because we are making templates and we have to fill that template for example you are making a website which looks like OYO rooms now here oyo become a member oyo for business I don't have to write all this I have written lorem I will write 7 words and enter then I will give it to oyo so here you can use this to fill the placeholder my plan is to make clones of popular websites so that you can know how things work this is also a popular website if you have used their services then do tell me in the comment section now we will see more things like paragraphs how to style it and all these things are done through CSS now in paragraphs when I wrote lorem 23 I will press P to enter if I write lorem 10 then I will get only 10 words and if I want to write lorem 100 then I can do that so this lorem trick is very useful and whenever we make clones of popular websites I will make a clone of amazon.in so here I have to write something I can't see much text so I will write lorem 3 I won't think about makeup products I will write lorem 4 or lorem 3 or lorem 2 and I will make a template and then I will get everything from my database and I can get my text from different sources many people asked will this course job ready the answer is yes I will make you so that you can actually learn the industry level jobs now let's talk about attributes in HTML so what are attributes? these are attributes in HTML like I used HTML tag lang is equal to en we didn't use any attribute in body we didn't use any attribute in h1 we didn't use any attribute in p but I can use a style attribute in p which is called inline css if I make background color red like this then background color will be red this is called inline css through style attribute we learned to add css here but if you add style is equal to then you will get background red let me show you this is background red let me make it teal this color looks good so I can also add style inline but when you make industry level websites we use inline styles very less because maintainability and reusability is less so we want to shift small bundles on the browser and our website is more optimized so we avoid all these things but inline css style is a tag but here style is an attribute p is a tag p tag has an attribute style through which we can style this element we will learn more about attributes attributes basically give enhanced functionality to an element like we gave style to this paragraph which was background color thizzle to give this background color we used style attribute in the same way we use this style attribute to give a tag or an element like we talked about link link colon css link has relic attribute href attribute so with this attribute we can add css style sheet for example background color let me add body first what we need in body is background color and don't worry about this we will see how it works because css style will tell you but let me do hot pink let's listen another functionality of vs code this ninja technique will be useful hover mouse and choose any color you want like this so you can see my body background color is like this how did you like ninja technique write in comments now we are back in index.html now we are back in index.html I can remove this because I will comment it so it won't be style sheet which is very natural background color was coming from style sheet so I didn't remove this which is very natural here I did style is equal to background color because of which it was visible now we are going to make bookmark manager bookmark manager.html and I am making this file I have told you different headings I am going to make a useful bookmark manager so I will write bookmark manager now you will say this bookmark manager is available in chrome why are you making it? because it is made by us so you will have a different love for it because this is you made it yourself someone made a software you made a software yourself so the software you made yourself is different so I wrote bookmark manager code with h1 and I will write my bookmarks now I will write h2 here I will write primary bookmarks and then I will write secondary bookmarks in fact if I press alt shift bottom space and I write secondary bookmarks so what will happen? now I will write google in a paragraph or I will write google like this but in the upcoming videos I will tell you how to use list for now you can think like this google I will write open google and I will use anchor tag so as soon as I press enter there is a mandatory attribute href, which means which link should I go to so I will write href is equal to https://www.google.com so I will go to this address whenever someone clicks open google I will cut this and put it here so the content of this tag will be like this and here you can see href is equal to ia, open google this is called anchor tag which helps us to make links you must have seen many such links now you see here as soon as I go to bookmark manager.html you can see here that you can see all the bookmarks like this, open google now I will click on this and google will open now you can see, now you noticed one thing when I did not click on google, it was blue now I have visited it, so its color has changed so its color changes when you visit it so it has converted into a visited link so I am knowing that I have visited it now I will tell you one more thing that here if we want it to open in the new tab as I am clicking on it, it is opening in the same tab if you want to open it in the new tab, then you have two ways either you can click on this mouse wheel this mouse wheel like this now I will tell you another way if someone clicks on it, then you can use an attribute if someone clicks on it, then you can use an attribute you can write here that target is equal to underscore blank and VS code is suggested to you so I have written it by hitting two enter you can write it in notepad or in any other cheap editor so what happens to you, it is cheap according to quality VS code is free but if you use cheap editor according to quality then target is equal to underscore blank you have to type it completely, it will be a pain but if you write it in any way so what happens now, I am clicking on it I am not clicking on the mouse wheel I will click on it, it is in the new tab I will click on the mouse wheel, then it will open in the new tab so I can open it like this I have written a simple open google here if you want, you can use your favorite website whatever website you like you can use it friends, I have used good websites now I will write open facebook and here you see www.facebook.com and I write here www.doodwithhari.com and after this we will put here let us say, which website should I put youtube.com let's see if it came or not you see one thing, it is coming in one line if you want it to not come in one line then what you will do you will put it in your paragraphs this is a very dirty way I am telling it dirty way, I will tell you later but you can enclose it in a paragraph if you want, and I will press shift right arrow key, I will press control x then I will press end key all the cursors will go to end because if you press end key on one cursor then it goes to end and after this I will press control I have used this shortcut a lot and many of you will be like what did I do if you are a beginner but I simply used the functionality of VS code multiple cursor functionality I have used multiple cursors by pressing alt and after that I have used it this is not a good way we never make a list using paragraphs we have not read this list so we are using paragraphs but this will work for us and the ones we have not visited are blue we have visited facebook, this one is also purple we have visited kora, this one is also purple so these are your primary bookmarks what will be your secondary bookmarks we will put 2 secondary bookmarks your secondary bookmarks are those which you visit sometimes like wikipedia.com and like stackoverflow.com we will write the spelling correctly so this is the stackoverflow of bookmarks we will capitalise on this and now you can see your wikipedia and stackoverflow so this is your bookmark manager and you can make this bookmark manager even better we will learn styling from CSS so if you think this is ugly then don't worry about it don't worry about it because we will do styling and designing in the coming time for now your bookmark looks like this bookmark manager code with is your title and I will write it in h1 so both will be same our title and h1 and my bookmarks code with is also written here so you can make a bookmark manager like this you can use it in actual now if you save it like this like my bookmark manager.html you can copy it and put it on your desktop whenever you want to open a website you just double click it and it will open if you double click and it opens from VS code then you have to do right click open with and then choose Google Chrome and always do it so I will choose Google Chrome and always do it so whenever I double click it will open from Google Chrome so this was our bookmark manager I hope you liked it now I have a request from you today our 4 videos are completed so if you liked this course then share it with your friends I know very few people will share it but if you do then I will be encouraged and I will try to bring more courses like this so many people
